semantic.role: Infrastructure layer facade factory for instantiating LLM provider clients based on configuration.
responsibilities: Provides a static factory method to create LLM client instances for supported providers (OpenAI, DeepSeek, OpenRouter, Groq, Gemini, Mock).
Encapsulates provider-specific client instantiation logic behind a unified interface.
Handles provider name normalization (case-insensitive matching) to select appropriate client implementation.
Throws descriptive errors for unsupported provider names.
outOfScope: Orchestrating LLM calls or managing conversation state.
Implementing provider-specific client logic (delegated to provider modules).
Managing configuration loading or validation beyond instantiation parameters.
invariants: Must expose a stable factory interface for LLM client creation.
Must not absorb service/task/engine orchestration concerns (pure instantiation).

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a centralized facade for LLM client instantiation, decoupling client creation from usage across the infrastructure layer.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: feat(assets): project templates, rules & derived semantic index (v1.0-RC) - likely extends or refines the factory's configuration handling or provider support.
